pages.text_sample: Human-Centered Care Services - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Services Our Consulting Services If you are interested in care integration, human-centered care, empathic communication, trauma informed care, Motivational Interviewing, decreasing stigma and bias, supporting your employees in a meaningful way, developing high quality virtual or digital care, we can help! The Lay Counselor Academy We provide intensive, high quality learning, development and support for your staff to be confident, competent counselors for your patients, clients or students. Find Out More Supporting Employee Mental Health We know your employees need care too, and that the EAP just doesn’t cut it. We provide incredible, high quality, rapid and direct access to mental health services for your employees, including individual counseling, and support groups. Support For Your Employees Learning and Development Our Workshop Series and Training Courses aren’t training-as-usual. They are interactive, practice-based, relationship-focused and deeply engaging. Elevate your internal talent and embed empathic communication in your organization! Integrated Behavioral Health Ready for the next phase of integration? Increasing the ratio of BH providers to medical providers, addressing population health, equity-related health disparities, and building robust telehealth services are all part of IBH 2.0. We can help you get there! Get in touch If you don’t see what you need, reach out to us, we would love to co-create with you! Healthy equity is the foundation to all the work we do. Equity and empathy are inextricably linked. Equitable access, quality of care and health outcomes are not possible without ensuring everyone has access to non-judgmental, empathic care, from reception to exam room. You’re in Good Company Trusted by leading healthcare provider networks, Medicaid plans, community health centers and more. Our values Empathy Empathy directly impacts patient health outcomes and staff and provider satisfaction. All our work seeks to elevate opportunities to enhance empathy in day to day care provision. Equity Health Equity is a moral issue. All our work centralizes increasing practices that decrease health disparities, racism, stigma and other forms of discrimination. Relationship True healing, help and change happens in the context of relationships. We imperfectly strive to practice relationship-based collaboration and communication in all we do. Let’s start the conversation Get In Touch (209) 769-3923 Sitemap Contact About The Team Services Blog Useful links Free Empathic Care Resources The Lay Counselor Academy Supporting Employee Mental Health Get the latest news! Subscribe to our newsletter for expert insights and emphatic care strategies delivered to your inbox! Email Submit Linkedin Youtube © Copyright 2024-2026 EM Consulting, All Right Reserved. pages.text_sample: The Lay Counselor Academy - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Learn Essential Mental Health Counseling Skills! Empower your team to provide empathic, evidence-based mental healthcare. Transform care delivery and meet the growing behavioral health needs of the community you serve. What is a Lay Counselor? Lay counselors are trained professionals who provide crucial mental health support without traditional clinical licenses. They offer empathic care, bridging the gap in mental health services. Learn more What is The Lay Counselor Academy? The Lay Counselor Academy is a course that equips your staff with practical mental health counseling skills. See the options we offer below. 01 The LCA: Live Our flagship course! 14 weeks of live, practice-based learning. You will go through the course with a cohort of amazing people, just like yourself. There are 5 personal counseling sessions included in this option! Contact us to register. 02 The LCA: Self-Paced Our new, fully asynchronous course! You can learn foundational mental health counselings skills on your own schedule, at the time it works for you! The course is deep and wide covering everything you need to know for essential mental health counseling. Register for the Self-Paced course here. 03 The LCA: Hybrid Our new, asynchronous course PLUS live group and individual practices! Register for our next Hybrid course here. 04 CHW Certification, with a Mental Health Specialty Our CHW Certification comes with an emphasis on mental health; you’ll learn all the CHW core competencies, plus how to provide mental health counseling. Contact us to register. Listen to Co-Creators Elizabeth Morrison & Ali Moreno share their story and the mission behind The Lay Counselor Academy Benefits of Having Lay Counselors Meet patient, client, or student needs safely and promptly Elevate your most dedicated, skillful employees Disseminate core behavioral health counseling skills throughout your organization Fill gaps where licensed professionals are scarce Offer more bilingual and culturally congruent care options Expand mental health services efficiently “Hands down the most valuable course I've ever taken. I use the mental health counseling skills I learned in the LCA everyday, with my patients but also at home!” Oscar, LCA participant The cornerstone of evidence-based mental healthcare is the therapeutic alliance. While licenses and degrees can be important, they do not inherently ensure the ability to build strong, effective therapeutic relationships. In fact, many individuals without formal credentials possess exceptional skills in fostering these vital connections. Invest in your team's growth and your organization's mental health capacity $ 0 * Per person (Includes 14 live sessions, 5 personal counseling sessions) Self-Paced $ 0 Per person (Our new fully asynchronous course) *includes lifetime access to online learning platform and future course updates. Ready to transform mental healthcare in your organization? Talk to Our Team Get a copy of the LCA book Now, anyone can own all 300+ pages of LCA articles to learn the basics of mental health counseling! Buy it here (at cost – just printing and shipping!) Available in English and Spanish Purchase Your Copy Here Compra tu copia aquí We’re Being Recognized for Our Impact We’re honored to share that the California Health Care Foundation studied The Lay Counselor Academy for two years. The report shows LCA helps people feel more confident, love their jobs more, and brings more fairness to the mental health field. Read the full CHCF Report. Read Our Executive Summary Empathy looks good on you. From your first course to cohort graduation, you’ve been doing the heart work. Now be part of the team. This tee is for every LCA learner, past an

pages.text_sample: Employee Mental Health Support - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Flourish Counseling Services Empathic, Affordable Mental Health Counseling for You. Just text 209-800-7922 to get started! This is counseling, the way it should be: compassionate, non-judgmental support for you, as you navigate life’s challenges. Not sure? Text us for a free 30-minute counseling session, to try us out! Learn More Our Flourish Counselors We also contract with organizations to provide employees easy access to high quality mental healthcare! Workers who felt supported with their mental health overall were 26% less likely to report at least one symptom of a mental health condition in the past year. Mental Health in the Workplace Report 2021 Mind Share Partners Imagine telling your employees they have easy, fast access to high-quality mental health support. With Flourish, employees can text a dedicated number, and ask to be connected to a counselor. They will get a response within hours, and be connected with an empathic, skillful counselor within days. It is that easy! Not Sure where to start? Reach out to us with any questions and our team will answer. Speak to Our Team Want to know more about flourish? Download our PDF with more details to take back to your team. Download PDF Why Choose Flourish? Ease of Access Imagine your employees being able to text a phone number when they want mental health counseling, get a response within 8 hours and be connected to help within 2 days. The Team We have Licensed Therapists as well as a dynamite supportive counseling team, trained in CBT, Motivational Interviewing, Empathic Listening and Behavioral Activation. Our Approach Our strength-based approach can support your employees with burnout, work/life harmony, parenting difficulties, mental health struggles, life transitions and difficult decisions. Why Mental Health Matters At Work There are benefits to both employees & the employer when people feel supported and listened to concerning their mental health: Support Employees who feel supported by their employer are less likely to experience mental health symptoms. Fewer sick days Fewer days missed from work from poor mental health and increased productivity and happiness at work. Job Satisfaction Higher job satisfaction and intentions to stay at their company. Employees are more comfortable discussing mental health at work. Trust An increased positive view and trust of their company and its leaders. Being proud to work at their respective company. Learn More Let’s start the conversation Get In Touch You’re in Good Company Trusted by leading healthcare provider networks, Medicaid plans, community health centers and more. pages.text_sample: About EM Consulting – Empathic Healthcare for All Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat About Us Transforming Mental Healthcare, Together We believe mental healthcare should be accessible, empathic, and rooted in the community. The problem is clear. We have an overwhelming surge in mental health needs coupled with a critical shortage of licensed clinicians. This gap makes it increasingly challenging to access care for the patients or clients who rely on us. With the Lay Counselor Academy , we’ve created a scalable, human-centered approach to mental healthcare – one therapeutic conversation at a time. Our Mission We envision a future where everyone seeking culturally responsive mental health support can find it quickly and locally, provided by compassionate counselors who listen deeply, understand fully, and respond with genuine empathy. Connect With Us Meet the Co-Creators The Lay Counselor Academy is the vision of two dedicated leaders committed to reshaping the mental healthcare landscape: Elizabeth Morrison Psychologist, licensed clinical social worker, and addiction professional with extensive experience in community mental health advocacy. Alli Moreno Lay counselor and community mental health advocate. Meet Our Team Listen to Co-Creators Elizabeth Morrison & Ali Moreno share their story and the mission behind The Lay Counselor Academy Empower your team to provide empathic, evidence-based mental healthcare. Transform care delivery and meet the growing behavioral health needs of the community you serve. Why Mental Healthcare Matters? Mental healthcare is a fundamental human right. By preparing Community Health Workers, Case Managers, School Staff, First Responders, and others to deliver mental health counseling, we can dramatically expand access to high-quality mental health treatment. Through the Lay Counselor Academy , we are advancing a movement that values practical skills over degrees and licenses. It’s a vision of hope, healing, and accessibility—rooted in relationship-based care, connection and empathy. The Lay Counselor Academy Through the Lay Counselor Academy, we are advancing a movement that values practical skills over degrees and licenses. It’s a vision of hope, healing, and accessibility—rooted in genuine connection and empathy. Find out More “This life-changing course transformed my intuition into practical skills. It's truly my calling, bringing joy and satisfaction through helping others. The skills I've learned enhance all my interactions, making them more effective and satisfying - from personal relationships to professional settings.” Lorena, LCA graduate Partner with Us! Whether you want to enhance your organization’s mental health treatment capacity, support your employees, or explore our resources, we’re here to help. The Lay Counselor Academy Transform your community by mastering essential counseling skills through our practice-based training program. Learn more Supporting Employee Mental Health Enhance workplace wellbeing with evidence-based mental health support services for your entire team. Learn more Practical Healthcare Resources to Use Access practical tools and proven frameworks to deliver more effective, human-centered healthcare services Learn more Interested in the Lay Counselor Academy for your organization? Contact us to see how the Lay Counselor Academy can transform your organization Let's Connect (209) 769-3923 Sitemap Contact About The Team Services Blog Useful links Free Empathic Care Resources The Lay Counselor Academy Supporting Employee Mental Health Get the latest news! pages.text_sample: About EM Consulting – Empathic Healthcare for All Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat About Us Transforming Mental Healthcare, Together We believe mental healthcare should be accessible, empathic, and rooted in the community. The problem is clear. We have an overwhelming surge in mental health needs coupled with a critical shortage of licensed clinicians. This gap makes it increasingly challenging to access care for the patients or clients who rely on us. With the Lay Counselor Academy , we’ve created a scalable, human-centered approach to mental healthcare – one therapeutic conversation at a time. Our Mission We envision a future where everyone seeking culturally responsive mental health support can find it quickly and locally, provided by compassionate counselors who listen deeply, understand fully, and respond with genuine empathy. Connect With Us Meet the Co-Creators The Lay Counselor Academy is the vision of two dedicated leaders committed to reshaping the mental healthcare landscape: Elizabeth Morrison Psychologist, licensed clinical social worker, and addiction professional with extensive experience in community mental health advocacy. Alli Moreno Lay counselor and community mental health advocate. Meet Our Team Listen to Co-Creators Elizabeth Morrison & Ali Moreno share their story and the mission behind The Lay Counselor Academy Empower your team to provide empathic, evidence-based mental healthcare. Transform care delivery and meet the growing behavioral health needs of the community you serve. Why Mental Healthcare Matters? Mental healthcare is a fundamental human right. By preparing Community Health Workers, Case Managers, School Staff, First Responders, and others to deliver mental health counseling, we can dramatically expand access to high-quality mental health treatment. Through the Lay Counselor Academy , we are advancing a movement that values practical skills over degrees and licenses. It’s a vision of hope, healing, and accessibility—rooted in relationship-based care, connection and empathy. The Lay Counselor Academy Through the Lay Counselor Academy, we are advancing a movement that values practical skills over degrees and licenses. It’s a vision of hope, healing, and accessibility—rooted in genuine connection and empathy. Find out More “This life-changing course transformed my intuition into practical skills. It's truly my calling, bringing joy and satisfaction through helping others. The skills I've learned enhance all my interactions, making them more effective and satisfying - from personal relationships to professional settings.” Lorena, LCA graduate Partner with Us! Whether you want to enhance your organization’s mental health treatment capacity, support your employees, or explore our resources, we’re here to help. The Lay Counselor Academy Transform your community by mastering essential counseling skills through our practice-based training program. Learn more Supporting Employee Mental Health Enhance workplace wellbeing with evidence-based mental health support services for your entire team. Learn more Practical Healthcare Resources to Use Access practical tools and proven frameworks to deliver more effective, human-centered healthcare services Learn more Interested in the Lay Counselor Academy for your organization? Contact us to see how the Lay Counselor Academy can transform your organization Let's Connect (209) 769-3923 Sitemap Contact About The Team Services Blog Useful links Free Empathic Care Resources The Lay Counselor Academy Supporting Employee Mental Health Get the latest news! Subscribe to our newsletter for expert insights and emphatic care strategies delivered to your inbox! Email Submit Linkedin Youtube © Copyright 2024-2026 EM Consulting, All Right Reserved. Statistics Statistics The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you. Marketing Marketing The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes. pages.text_sample: Cookie Policy (UK) - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Cookie Policy (UK) Cookie Policy (UK) This Cookie Policy was last updated on December 19, 2025 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the United Kingdom. 1. Introduction Our website, https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com (hereinafter: "the website") uses cookies and other related technologies (for convenience all technologies are referred to as "cookies"). Cookies are also placed by third parties we have engaged. In the document below we inform you about the use of cookies on our website. 2. What are cookies? A cookie is a small simple file that is sent along with pages of this website and stored by your browser on the hard drive of your computer or another device. The information stored therein may be returned to our servers or to the servers of the relevant third parties during a subsequent visit. 3. What are scripts? A script is a piece of program code that is used to make our website function properly and interactively. This code is executed on our server or on your device. 4. What is a web beacon? A web beacon (or a pixel tag) is a small, invisible piece of text or image on a website that is used to monitor traffic on a website. In order to do this, various data about you is stored using web beacons. 5. Cookies 5.1 Technical or functional cookies Some cookies ensure that certain parts of the website work properly and that your user preferences remain known. By placing functional cookies, we make it easier for you to visit our website. This way, you do not need to repeatedly enter the same information when visiting our website and, for example, the items remain in your shopping cart until you have paid. We may place these cookies without your consent. 5.2 Statistics cookies We use statistics cookies to optimize the website experience for our users. With these statistics cookies we get insights in the usage of our website. We ask your permission to place statistics cookies. 5.3 Marketing/Tracking cookies Marketing/Tracking cookies are cookies or any other form of local storage, used to create user profiles to display advertising or to track the user on this website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes. 6. Placed cookies Elementor Statistics (anonymous) Consent to service elementor Usage We use Elementor for content creation. Read more about Elementor Sharing data This data is not shared with third parties. Statistics (anonymous) Name elementor Expiration persistent Function Store performed actions on the website WooCommerce Statistics Consent to service woocommerce Usage We use WooCommerce for webshop management. Read more about WooCommerce Sharing data This data is not shared with third parties. Statistics Name History.store Expiration Function Store last visit WordPress Functional Consent to service wordpress Usage We use WordPress for website development. Read more about WordPress Sharing data This data is not shared with third parties.
